name: Vhal'Qeth, the Radiant Facet
description:
3D asset, full body character model, T-pose baseline posture, isolated on a solid neutral gray background. A surreal Lovecraftian cosmic horror creature. 

The main body is an asymmetric, floating polyhedron crystalline cluster made of iridescent, semi-translucent obsidian glass that shifts between deep violet and oily teal. Projecting outward from the non-Euclidean facets are twelve elongated, jointed spider-like appendages, but instead of joints, the limbs are connected by hovering, unattached glowing magenta energy rings. Each limb terminates in a finely detailed, hyper-realistic human hand pointing outward in a stiff, radial pattern.

At the epicenter of the crystalline cluster is a massive, wet, hyper-detailed mammalian eye with an inverted, horizontal goat-like pupil, surrounded by an ring of twitching, fleshy cilia instead of eyelids. Drooping from the bottom of the central mass are several thin, dangling sea-anemone tentacles with micro-sucker textures. 

High-resolution 3D mesh, clean topology, organic-meets-geometric hard surface details, digital sculpting style, unreal engine 5 material render, PBR textures, subsurface scattering on the eye and tentacles, sharp specular highlights on the crystal facets. No pedestal, no background artifacts, clean silhouette boundary.
